name: Generaider Boss Bite
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>王の憤激</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジェネレイド・バイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Tribute any number of "Generaider" monsters, then target 1 face-up Xyz Monster you control; attach exactly that many "Generaider" monsters from your hand, field, and/or GY to it, except the monsters Tributed to activate this effect. You can only activate 1 "Generaider Boss Bite" per turn.
eff: Tribute any number of "Generaider" monsters, then target 1 face-up Xyz Monster you control; attach exactly that many "Generaider" monsters from your hand, field, and/or GY to it, except the monsters Tributed to activate this effect. You can only activate 1 "Generaider Boss Bite" per turn.

action: Attaches from your hand as Xyz Material
Attaches from your field as Xyz Material
Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
